## 🎓 Your Complete AI Skill Ecosystem

### **5 Master SKILLs** (Type `/` in Copilot Chat)

| SKILL | Purpose | Usage |
|-------|---------|-------|
| `/research-deep-dive` | Analyze programs, alumni outcomes, job market | Start here in June |
| `/sop-generator` | Write 650-word SOPs with feedback scoring | July–August |
| `/resume-optimizer` | Create 4 ATS-optimized resumes | July–August |
| `/interview-prep-sprint` | Admissions + F-1 visa interview prep | August–September |
| `/admissions-tracker` | Manage deadlines, checklists, progress | Ongoing |

### **24 Individual Prompts** (For one-off tasks)

- **Research** (7): Program analysis, job market intel, scholarships
- **SOP** (8): Extract story, draft, review, refine, polish
- **Interview** (7): Question generation, mock sessions, answer review
- **Resume** (2): ATS scoring, school-specific generation

## 📊 What You'll Build

By following this system, you'll have:

**By July 31, 2026:**
- [ ] 4 deep program research profiles
- [ ] 4 school-specific SOPs (650 words each)
- [ ] 4 ATS-optimized resumes (8.5+/10 score)

**By September 30, 2026:**
- [ ] 40+ interview Q&A practiced
- [ ] 2 full mock interviews completed
- [ ] Ready for interviews

**By October 31, 2026:**
- [ ] 4 applications submitted
- [ ] All documents confirmed uploaded
- [ ] Interview scheduled

**By January 2027:**
- [ ] Admission offers received
- [ ] F-1 visa approved
- [ ] Ready to depart ✈️

---

## 💡 Key Features

✅ **Bundled Templates** — Don't start from blank pages  
✅ **Real Examples** — See what "done" looks like  
✅ **Built-In Rubrics** — Know how you'll be scored  
✅ **Clear Workflows** — 5–7 step processes  
✅ **Progressive Phases** — Enhancements coming July–December  
✅ **Auto-Discovery** — VS Code finds all SKILLs automatically  

---

## 🎓 How the 5 SKILLs Connect

```
┌──────────────────────┐
│ RESEARCH DEEP DIVE   │ ← Start here (June)
│ (Program profiles)   │   Understand each school
└──────────────────┬───┘
                   │ Informs
                   ▼
        ┌──────────────────────┐
        │  SOP GENERATOR       │ ← July
        │  (Write SOPs)        │   Use insights to write
        └──────────────────────┘
                   │ & Research
                   ▼
        ┌──────────────────────┐
        │ RESUME OPTIMIZER     │ ← July–August
        │ (4 tailored resumes) │   Tailor per school
        └──────────────────────┘
                   │
        ┌──────────▼──────────┐
        │ ADMISSIONS TRACKER  │ ← Ongoing (primary in Sep–Oct)
        │ (Manage deadlines)  │   Track all documents
        └──────────────────────┘
                   │
        ┌──────────▼──────────────┐
        │INTERVIEW PREP SPRINT    │ ← August–October
        │ (Practice + prep)       │   40+ Q&A + mocks
        └──────────────────────────┘
```

---

## ✨ What Makes This Different

This isn't just templates — it's a **complete system** with:

1. **Progressive Enhancement** — Start simple, improve continuously
2. **Bundled Assets** — Templates + examples + guides included
3. **Clear Workflows** — Step-by-step processes that work
4. **Built-In Quality** — Scoring rubrics, checklists, FAQs
5. **Timeline Aligned** — SKILLs match your project phases
6. **Auto-Discoverable** — VS Code finds everything automatically
